articles.content: ChatGPT-maker OpenAI has filed confidentially for an initial public offering, the company announced Monday in a blog post. The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, … [+7610 chars]

articles.title: Big 12 teams consider not playing Texas Tech, given the Brendan Sorsby ruling - NBC Sports
articles.description: Would other Big 12 teams boycott Texas Tech games?
articles.content:
Good news? Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby has regained his eligibility to play college football in 2026. 
Bad news? The Red Raiders could have no one to play against.
